Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] I opened/linked an issue and the approach was agreed
- [ ] Focused change (one logical thing)
- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes
- [ ] No secrets or data files added (`.env`, `*.db`, `*.sqlite`, dumps)
- [ ] No hard-coded models (models resolve from routing slots)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavioural changes
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or setup changed
